LayerBridge WhiteGate
notes:
![LayerBridge](https://mserver.ro/assets/img/logo.png "LayerBridge")

**LayerBridge** is a registered company in Romania with Fiscal ID: 32101070 and Chamber of Commerce ID: J40/9776/2013, which offers datacenter services, such as [colocation](https://www.hetnix.com/colocation), [dedicated servers](https://www.hetnix.com/dedicated-servers) and [virtual servers](https://www.hetnix.com/kvm-servers) in Romania.

**LayerBridge** operates **ROPN-IX** at this location.

**ROPN-IX** or the **Romanian Open Internet Exchange**, is an open IXP located in Romania. It's main goal is to offer the possibility of interconnection for it's members free of charge* without membership or port fees or any other absurd costs.
For the moment, we only allow Electric (RJ45) 1 Gbps ports and 10GbE SFP+ Ports.

* For the moment, limited to 1 Gbps ports or 1x 10GbE port.

Operating **AS60113** for the route servers.

* Joining to the IXP via a LayerBridge VM is possible: **[ROPN-IX](https://mserver.ro/cart.php?a=add&pid=164)**.

DMO - Datacenter Münster Osnabrück (DMO1)
notes:
High-availability data centers form the backbone of digitalization. With the “DMO - Datacenter Münster Osnabrück”, the most modern data center in the region is being built at Münster Osnabrück Airport. Planning for the construction and operation of the regional data center has been underway since 2022. So that we can concentrate fully on our mission: Strengthening resilience through stability in digitalization. This was preceded by numerous considerations as to how the two parent companies can secure their own requirements for data center services and offer them more extensively due to customer requirements through additional capacities and resources. For as new as our company is, we are experienced in the competencies within the core areas. DMO GmbH combines the necessary qualities from the services of both parent companies.

In addition to high security standards and outstanding national and international connectivity, the focus is on sustainability and energy efficiency. As a subsidiary of items GmbH & Co. KG and TKRZ Stadtwerke GmbH, we can draw on over 45 years of IT expertise. DMO will be a hub where the digital sovereignty and resilience of regional organizations and companies will be sustainably strengthened.

We are planning to be production ready Q1/2026

name: LayerBridge Pipera
notes:
![LayerBridge](https://mserver.ro/assets/img/logo.png "LayerBridge")

**LayerBridge** is a registered company in Romania with Fiscal ID: 32101070 and Chamber of Commerce ID: J40/9776/2013, which offers datacenter services, such as [colocation](https://www.hetnix.com/colocation), [dedicated servers](https://www.hetnix.com/dedicated-servers) and [virtual servers](https://www.hetnix.com/kvm-servers) in Romania.

**LayerBridge** operates **ROPN-IX** at this location.

**ROPN-IX** or the **Romanian Open Internet Exchange**, is an open IXP located in Romania. It's main goal is to offer the possibility of interconnection for it's members free of charge* without membership or port fees or any other absurd costs.
For the moment, we only allow Electric (RJ45) 1 Gbps ports and 10GbE SFP+ Ports.

* For the moment, limited to 1 Gbps ports or 1x 10GbE port

Operating **AS60113** for the route servers.

* Joining to the IXP via a LayerBridge VM is possible: **[ROPN-IX](https://mserver.ro/cart.php?a=add&pid=164)**
